sourceMovie.title: Ultraman: Rising
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Ultraman: Rising works as a animation movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The animation and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Despicable Me 4
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Ultraman: Rising clicked for you, Despicable Me 4 (2024) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and science fiction, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Big Hero 6
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Ultraman: Rising clicked for you, Big Hero 6 (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and family, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Ultraman: Rising?
faq.answer: Try Despicable Me 4, Big Hero 6, Despicable Me—each shares DNA with Ultraman: Rising while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Ultraman: Rising?
faq.answer: Ultraman: Rising (2024) is best described as Animation, Science Fiction, Family, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Ultraman: Rising worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 8.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this animation lane.
